testcase.name: test_02_meta_ads_status
testcase.failure: tests/test_meta_ads_advanced.py:52: in test_02_meta_ads_status assert response.status_code == 200, f"Status endpoint failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Status endpoint failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_03_meta_ads_token_info
testcase.failure: tests/test_meta_ads_advanced.py:61: in test_03_meta_ads_token_info assert response.status_code == 200, f"Token info failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Token info failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_meta_ads_advanced.py:108: in test_05_sync_status_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Sync status failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Sync status failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_06_unmapped_ads_endpoint
testcase.failure: tests/test_meta_ads_advanced.py:125: in test_06_unmapped_ads_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Unmapped ads failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Unmapped ads failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_07_sync_status_unauthorized

failure.message: AssertionError: Non-CEO should get 403, got 401 assert 401 == 403 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_meta_ads_advanced.py:165: in test_07_sync_status_unauthorized assert response.status_code == 403, f"Non-CEO should get 403, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Non-CEO should get 403, got 401 E assert 401 == 403 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
